facebook.caption: Tourists walk straight past this. Chợ đêm Phú Quốc is where the island actually eats after dark. Street food, fresh seafood, local snacks you won't find on any resort menu. 5,995 reviews and still not on most itineraries. Show up hungry. Arrive before 8pm for the best picks. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Night market chaos in the best way. Watch the grill smoke roll in at Chợ đêm Phú Quốc, grab something you can't name, eat it anyway. This is Phu Quoc after dark.
